title: Verify release bundle vault
validator_role: AGI Node Validator or human reviewer
why_needed: Product lineage should be preserved as inspectable evidence.
promotion_rule: No release lineage claim without bundle manifest.

title: Run objective diversity regression
why_needed: GoalOS must not generate identical AGI Jobs for unrelated objectives.
acceptance_tests: AI trust room and solar microgrid objectives produce different domains
promotion_rule: No objective-native claim without diversity evidence.

title: Audit local/no-wallet boundary
why_needed: The site must not imply live wallet, backend, user-fund, or settlement behavior in local mode.
acceptance_tests: no forbidden APIs in generated v75 pages
promotion_rule: No deployment claim if boundary fails.

title: Prepare ProofBundle return package
why_needed: AGI Jobs require return evidence before Chronicle promotion.
promotion_rule: No Chronicle promotion unless replay and validation pass.

title: Create external replay reviewer room
why_needed: Holy Grail candidate framing must move toward public evidence, not only narrative.
promotion_rule: No external validation claim without reviewer evidence.
